checklist.criterion: Uses Given/When/Then (Gherkin) format for all acceptance criteria
Covers the success path: valid credentials result in authenticated session
Covers the failure path: incorrect password returns a visible error message
Covers the lockout scenario: account locked after exactly 5 failed attempts
Uses observable, user-facing outcomes only — no references to session tokens, database calls, or internal implementation
Includes measurable timing or threshold where relevant (e.g., redirect within 2 seconds after login)
Includes an explicit Out of Scope section
All criteria formatted as checkbox items (- [ ] ...)
No vague language such as 'works correctly', 'is easy', or 'handles gracefully' in any criterion
No implementation instructions — criteria do not specify UI framework, validation library, or backend technology
